name: Spring Promo — Carousel A/B
top_hook: Still thinking about it? Here's 15% off.
raw_notes: Frequency creeping past 4, CTR down from 1.6% three weeks ago. No new creative uploaded since launch.

name: Cold Prospecting — UGC Testimonial Set

raw_notes: Healthy performance, still scaling. Only 2 creative variants live — room to test more hooks before fatigue sets in.

raw_notes: Weakest performer in the account. Static-only creative, same three images since launch, no urgency variation.

name: Evergreen Brand — Founder Story
top_hook: Why I started this company at my kitchen table.
raw_notes: Stable long-runner. No refresh in 6 weeks — due for a hook rotation before it decays.
